title: Authentication via API token for Atlassian Rovo MCP Server
description: Authentication via API token is now supported for Atlassian Rovo MCP. While OAuth remains the best fit for end‑user, interactive scenarios, this new optional authentication helps MCP clients authenticate without a browser‑based OAuth consent screen – which is specifically designed for machine‑to‑machine and automated use cases. To enable authentication using API token access with the Atlassian Rovo MCP Server:
